pr.title: Record: FP16 Embed + Sliding Window Eval + Warmdown Tuning (pending eval)

output.summary: Quantizes with FP16 tied embeddings, stride-64 sliding-window eval, and a tuned warmdown/LR schedule for better convergence under the 10-min cap.
techniques: FP16 passthrough for tied embeddings during INT8 quantization
Stride-64 sliding-window evaluation scoring only the rightmost tokens
Extended warmdown iterations and 0.06 matrix LR for the 10-minute budget
